title: Fabulously Better
description: The leading, optimization modpack with a focus on performance.
body:
The Fabulously Better Modpack aims to provide a base of the best performance mods for The Forge Loader.

📥 Installation Guide
****
Installation (Modrinth App)

Download and install the Modrinth app
Login with your Minecraft account
Select "Browse" on the Left side
Search for "Fabulously Better"
Select and download it.

Compatibility
****
Built on Fabric

Fabulously Better uses the Forge mod loader, which is lightweight and supports a lot of mods.

Compatibility

Fabulously Better is for versions 1.19.2+ and has been tested with the Modrinth App and ATLauncher.

It's always advised to use the latest version of Simply Beautifulto get the best experience.
